validation_gates.reason: The target remains under tests/, the enforceability root; policy, contracts, schemas, fixtures, source authority, evidence, lifecycle data, release state, health guidance, and public implementation remain in their owning roots.

The README distinguishes PUBLIC_AQI_REPORT from concentration/observation roles, canonical CamelCase contracts from lowercase compatibility pointers, source documentation from admitted source authority, and tests from policy, evidence, release, regulatory, and health authority.

The child lane is recorded as README-only; the adjacent test is a one-line placeholder; the Rego file is default-deny scaffold text; the three schemas are permissive; and the invalid fixture is metadata-only.
The committed README has one H1, seventy-six unique headings, thirty-eight fenced-block delimiter lines, a final newline, and all internal fragment links resolve.

Nine readable line-boundary fragments were individually Git-blob verified and then reconstructed by a checksum-gated temporary workflow. No common credential patterns, real source payloads, private endpoints, protected-location data, living-person data, current official alerts, medical guidance, protective-action instructions, or production trust artifacts were introduced.
This change is documentation-only; no substantive direct test, policy adapter, fixture payload, schema closure, or validator was established or modified.
Pull-request workflows were still running when this receipt was emitted; final status must be read from the pull-request head.
